Package.Name: Subscriptions
Package.Summary: Generate constrained Subscriptions configuration and usage recipes.

Tips.Generated: The code is generated from constrained options.
Tips.Ownership: The recipe makes lifecycle ownership explicit.

Purpose.Title: Purpose
Purpose.Body: Use these recipes as source-accurate starting points without running generated code.

Boundaries.Title: Boundaries
Boundaries.Constrained: Identifiers and API choices are allowlisted.
Boundaries.Ownership: Cancellation and disposal ownership stay visible.

Source.Title: Source documentation
Source.Body: Read the package documentation for the complete behavioral contract.

subscribe.Name: Typed subscription
subscribe.Description: Register one typed callback for a key.

filter-map.Name: Filter and map
filter-map.Description: Constrain object input before callback delivery.

remove.Name: Owned removal
remove.Description: Dispose the registration and then the hub.
